title: polyphlebium capillaceum
intro: Polyphlebium capillaceum, also known as the thread-leaved spleenwort, is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Polyphlebium capillaceum include its ability to reduce swelling and improve circulation, making it a potential treatment for conditions such as varicose veins and circulatory disorders. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and made into a tea or infusion, which can be used to promote overall well-being and support the body's natural healing processes.
